description: Happy path: topic with platform and freshness_days returns momentum classification with source artifacts

expect.momentum: one of: rising | flat | declining | unknown
expect.source_artifacts: array, may contain retrieved evidence or be empty
expect.retrieval_gaps: array, lists any gaps in retrieval
expect.freshness_note: string or null, notes data recency relative to freshness_days

prohibit: invented search volume or trend scores

description: Minimal inputs: topic only with default freshness window

expect.momentum: one of: rising | flat | declining | unknown

description: Edge case: retrieval fails entirely, momentum must be unknown with retrieval gaps recorded

input.topic: obscure antique wirework basket restoration technique

expect.retrieval_gaps: non-empty array describing what retrieval was attempted and why it failed
expect.note: present, confirms unknown is a valid honest answer

prohibit: momentum value other than unknown when no retrieval evidence exists
